entries.reason: Dev-only via @astrojs/rss. Entity expansion bypass when limits set to zero. No fix available. Portfolio does not process untrusted XML.
Transitive via fast-xml-parser. No fix available upstream.

Dev-only transitive dep (astro → unstorage → h3). serveStatic path traversal + SSE injection. Only active during astro dev, not in built static site. h3@1.15.8 is latest 1.x — v1.15.9 never published to npm. No fix available.
Transitive via h3@1.15.8. No fix available upstream (h3 1.15.9 not published).
